requests.prompt: Close-up of a traditional Chinese brick kiln mouth in Chinese ink wash animation style, glowing orange-red embers visible at the kiln mouth, dark workshop surroundings, several copper blanks with faint heat shimmer nearby, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, muted ink palette with strong orange-red glow accent, hand-painted brushwork, gongbi detail on the kiln bricks, large white space,8K,16:9 cinematic composition
